use std::collections::HashMap;

fn handle_request(request: &Request) -> Response {
    // BAD: feature flags file read on every request
    let flags_raw = std::fs::read_to_string("feature_flags.json").unwrap();
    let flags: HashMap<String, bool> = serde_json::from_str(&flags_raw).unwrap();

    if flags.get("enable_new_search").copied().unwrap_or(false) {
        return new_search_handler(request);
    }

    if flags.get("enable_caching").copied().unwrap_or(false) {
        let cached = check_cache(&request.key);
        if let Some(resp) = cached {
            return resp;
        }
    }

    legacy_handler(request)
}
